1.0.25.notes: Ability hack crash fixed + Ghost Kills added

1.0.26.notes:
1) Ability hack fixed to prevent crash
2) Kill All Lobby added
3) Ghost Kill: no one can know if you killed someone

1.0.29.notes:
1) Max Hit Count added (attacks land more hits)
2) New Misc tab (Kill All + Max Hit Count + player list)
3) Agency menu crash fixed

1.0.38.notes:
1) Fixed random crashes during/after matches
2) Hacks now work without needing to attack
3) Abilities stay active permanently (auto-refresh)
4) Settings autosave improved (abilities, radar, hotkeys)
5) Menu show/hide and unload hotkeys are now rebindable
6) Respawn toggles added (self / team / everyone, auto-capture at match start)
7) Stability and performance improvements

1.0.39.notes:
1) Fixed random crashes during/after matches
2) Hacks now work without needing to attack
3) Abilities stay active permanently (auto-refresh)
4) Settings autosave improved (abilities, radar, hotkeys)
5) Menu show/hide and unload hotkeys are now rebindable (all keyboards, incl. 60%)
6) Fixed crashes on unload and during updates
7) Respawn toggles added (self / team / everyone, auto-capture at match start)
8) Stability and performance improvements
